summary: Senior energy executive with 22 years at NextEra Energy, currently SVP of Development & Engineering for NextEra Energy Resources. Oversees $4B in annual capital deployment across utility-scale wind, solar, and battery storage projects. Led development of an 8 GW renewable portfolio spanning 15 US states. Established deep relationships with utility executives, state Public Utility Commissions, and FERC commissioners. Board member of the American Clean Power Association. Experienced with IRA incentive structures including 45X manufacturing credits and ITC allocations. Seeking CEO opportunity at a growth-stage energy storage company.

experience.title: Senior Vice President — Development & Engineering
bullets: Led development and engineering organisation of 350 professionals delivering 2-3 GW annually across wind, solar, and battery storage projects
Managed $4B annual capital deployment with full P&L responsibility for the project development pipeline
Secured IRA manufacturing credits (45X) and ITC allocations for 6 utility-scale battery storage projects totalling 3.2 GWh
Negotiated long-term PPAs and tolling agreements with 12 major US utility customers including Duke Energy, Southern Company, and Xcel Energy
Provided expert testimony before 4 state Public Utility Commissions on renewable energy procurement and grid reliability matters

experience.title: Vice President — Wind Development
bullets: Grew NextEra's Midwest wind portfolio from 2 GW to 6 GW across 8 states
Managed strategic relationships with GE Renewable Energy and Vestas for turbine supply agreements valued at $2B+
Led due diligence and integration for 3 wind portfolio acquisitions (combined 1.5 GW capacity)
Structured tax equity financing with JPMorgan, Goldman Sachs, and Bank of America for PTC monetization

experience.title: Director, Business Development (promoted from Manager, 2008)
bullets: Originated and developed wind and solar projects across Texas, Oklahoma, and California
Built financial models for project economics, PPA pricing, and tax equity structures
Managed environmental permitting and land acquisition for 15+ wind farm sites
